description: Scenario 2: Non-staple product with supplier knowledge — expected: likely_infringement

patent_context.patent_title: Specialised dosing apparatus for agricultural chemicals
patent_context.claim_description: A dosing apparatus with a specific valve and metering arrangement for controlled release of agricultural chemicals

product.product_description: A specialised metering device designed specifically for use with the patented dosing apparatus. Has no substantial non-infringing use.
product.staple_reasoning: The product is specifically designed for a single application that falls within the patent claims

supplier_conduct.reason_to_believe_details: Supplier is a former licensee whose licence was terminated. Supplier has detailed knowledge of the patent and its claims.
supplier_conduct.instructions_details: Product manual includes installation instructions that replicate the patented method
supplier_conduct.inducement_details: Marketing materials reference compatibility with the patented system by name

evidence_flags.evidence_notes: Former licensee with full knowledge; marketing materials and product manuals available as evidence
